import pillarbox from '@srgssr/pillarbox-web'; // Import the quality menu plugin import 'videojs-contrib-quality-menu'; // Create a pillarbox player instance with the quality menu plugin const player = pillarbox( 'video-element-id', { muted: true, plugins: { qualityMenu: true } } ); // Load the video source player.src({ src: 'urn:rts:video:9883196', type: 'srgssr/urn' });
